$schema: Exceptions file for guards/check-security.ts. Each exception needs reason, reviewer, and expiry (max ~30 days).

exceptions.reason: Transitive dev dependency via Vite/Astro (kumiko-platform docs/marketing). Windows dev-server file-read advisory only — Kumiko CI/prod runs macOS/Linux; dev tooling not exposed publicly. Tracked for upstream bump to esbuild >=0.28.1.

Transitive dev dependency via @changesets/parse (release tooling only). js-yaml@4.2.0 is already the latest release and still affected — no fix available upstream yet. DoS-via-merge-key-chains only triggers on attacker-controlled YAML input; changesets only parses repo-authored .changeset/*.md frontmatter, no untrusted input reaches it.
Transitive via CSS/SVG tooling (dev-time). removeScripts incompleteness is build-tooling only — no untrusted SVG in prod runtime. Track upstream patch.
Transitive dev dependency via ts-morph/glob (build tooling only). No patched release yet. ReDoS is CI/local-build-time only.
